ingredients.name: Gin
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with citrus, tonic, and floral liqueurs.

ingredients.name: Vodka
ingredients.pairing_notes: Neutral base that pairs with almost any juice, syrup, or liqueur.

ingredients.name: White Rum
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with citrus, pineapple, and mint.

ingredients.name: Dark Rum
ingredients.pairing_notes: Works beautifully with coconut cream, orgeat, and spiced syrups.

ingredients.name: Tequila (Blanco)
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with lime, citrus, and agave syrup.

ingredients.name: Mezcal
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with chili, citrus, and bitter amaro.

ingredients.name: Bourbon
ingredients.pairing_notes: Works well with bitters, honey syrup, and citrus.

ingredients.name: Rye Whiskey
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with sweet vermouth, bitters, and citrus zest.

ingredients.name: Scotch Whisky
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with honey, lemon, and dry vermouth.

ingredients.name: Cognac / Brandy
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with triple sec, lemon, and sweet liqueurs.

ingredients.name: Triple Sec / Curaçao
ingredients.pairing_notes: Essential with tequila, citrus juices, and tropical flavors.

ingredients.name: Maraschino Liqueur
ingredients.pairing_notes: Adds a cherry-almond lift to citrus and floral cocktails.

ingredients.name: Elderflower Liqueur
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs beautifully with gin, sparkling wine, and cucumber.

ingredients.name: Crème de Violette
ingredients.pairing_notes: Works well with gin, lemon, and maraschino.

ingredients.name: Amaretto
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with bourbon, coffee, and citrus.

ingredients.name: Coffee Liqueur
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with vodka, cream, and vanilla.

ingredients.name: Green Chartreuse
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with citrus, ginger, and other herbal spirits.

ingredients.name: Dry Vermouth
ingredients.pairing_notes: Essential in martinis; works well with gin and vodka.

ingredients.name: Sweet Vermouth
ingredients.pairing_notes: Core to Negronis and Manhattans; pairs with rye and campari.

ingredients.name: Aperol
ingredients.pairing_notes: Classic with prosecco and soda; pairs with citrus and elderflower.

ingredients.name: Campari
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with sweet vermouth, gin, and citrus for bold cocktails.

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: A universal acidic backbone for nearly any cocktail style.

ingredients.name: Lime Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: Key in tropical and tequila-based drinks; pairs with ginger and mint.

ingredients.name: Grapefruit Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with tequila, mezcal, and bitter aperitifs.

ingredients.name: Orange Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: Classic with vodka, champagne, and triple sec.

ingredients.name: Pineapple Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs brilliantly with rum, tequila, and coconut cream.

ingredients.name: Cranberry Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with vodka, citrus, and triple sec.

ingredients.name: Simple Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Universal sweetener that balances acids and bitters in any cocktail.

ingredients.name: Honey Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Wonderful with whisky, lemon, and herbal spirits.

ingredients.name: Agave Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Natural companion to tequila and mezcal cocktails.

ingredients.name: Orgeat
ingredients.pairing_notes: Essential in tiki cocktails; pairs with rum, citrus, and tropical flavors.

ingredients.name: Grenadine
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with citrus, spirits, and bubbly mixers for fruity cocktails.

ingredients.name: Angostura Bitters
ingredients.pairing_notes: Classic addition to whisky, rum, and gin cocktails for complexity.

ingredients.name: Orange Bitters
ingredients.pairing_notes: Brightens gin, vodka, and whisky-based drinks with citrus depth.

ingredients.name: Cacao Bitters
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with bourbon, dark rum, and coffee liqueur.

ingredients.name: Amaro (Generic)
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with whisky, citrus, and soda for stirred or built cocktails.

ingredients.name: Fernet-Style Bitter
ingredients.pairing_notes: A polarizing powerhouse; use sparingly with cola, citrus, or mint.

ingredients.name: Yuzu Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs beautifully with sake, gin, and elderflower liqueur.

ingredients.name: Tamarind Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Works well with tequila, mezcal, chili tincture, and citrus.

ingredients.name: Lavender Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with gin, lemon, and elderflower liqueur.

ingredients.name: Cardamom Tincture
ingredients.pairing_notes: Enhances gin, rum, and honey-based cocktails with exotic depth.

ingredients.name: Pink Peppercorn Tincture
ingredients.pairing_notes: Adds floral heat to vodka, gin, and berry-forward cocktails.

ingredients.name: Kaffir Lime Leaf Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with gin, coconut, rum, and Southeast Asian-inspired cocktails.

ingredients.name: Matcha Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Works well with vodka, gin, citrus, and cream-based cocktails.

ingredients.name: Wasabi (Diluted)
ingredients.pairing_notes: Adventurous addition to savory martinis and umami-forward cocktails.

ingredients.name: Smoked Salt Solution
ingredients.pairing_notes: Enhances mezcal, tequila, and savory cocktails with smoky minerality.

ingredients.name: Ginger Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with whisky, dark rum, citrus, and tropical flavors.

ingredients.name: Chili Tincture
ingredients.pairing_notes: Adds fire to tequila, mezcal, tropical, and savory cocktails.

ingredients.name: Soda Water
ingredients.pairing_notes: Universal diluting finisher; lifts and lengthens any cocktail.

ingredients.name: Tonic Water
ingredients.pairing_notes: Classic with gin and vodka; pairs well with citrus and botanicals.

ingredients.name: Ginger Beer
ingredients.pairing_notes: Essential in mule cocktails; pairs with lime, rum, and bourbon.

ingredients.name: Egg White / Aquafaba
ingredients.pairing_notes: Adds creamy foam to sours and citrus-forward shaken cocktails.

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream
ingredients.pairing_notes: Softens bitterness in coffee and chocolate cocktails; great with Irish whisky.

ingredients.name: Coconut Cream
ingredients.pairing_notes: Essential in Piña Coladas; pairs with dark rum, pineapple, and lime.

ingredients.name: Passion Fruit Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with rum, vodka, citrus, and sparkling wine in tropical cocktails.

ingredients.name: Cucumber Water
ingredients.pairing_notes: Refreshing addition to gin, elderflower, and vodka cocktails.

ingredients.name: Raspberry Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with gin, vodka, lemon, and sparkling wine.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper Tincture
ingredients.pairing_notes: Adds dry heat to vodka, gin, and savory or umami-style cocktails.

ingredients.name: Rose Water
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs beautifully with gin, lychee, elderflower, and citrus.

ingredients.name: Lychee Juice
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with vodka, gin, rose water, and elderflower liqueur.

ingredients.name: Mango Purée
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with rum, tequila, chili tincture, and lime.

ingredients.name: Cold Brew Coffee
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with vodka, coffee liqueur, cream, and vanilla syrup.

ingredients.name: Chamomile Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs well with gin, vodka, lemon, and light floral liqueurs.

ingredients.name: Hibiscus Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Bright and tangy; pairs with tequila, gin, citrus, and sparkling mixers.

ingredients.name: Cinnamon Syrup
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with bourbon, dark rum, apple juice, and chai-spiced cocktails.

ingredients.name: Absinthe
ingredients.pairing_notes: Used by the drop; pairs with citrus, mint, and egg white cocktails.

ingredients.name: Sake (Dry)
ingredients.pairing_notes: Pairs with yuzu, ginger, elderflower, and light citrus-forward spirits.

ingredients.name: Prosecco / Dry Sparkling Wine
ingredients.pairing_notes: Elevates aperitifs, elderflower, and citrus cocktails effortlessly.
